clientId.title: Smartcar Client ID
clientId.description: Your Smartcar application Client ID from dashboard.smartcar.com

hostIp.title: Homebridge Host IP
hostIp.description: IP address or hostname of the Raspberry Pi running Homebridge (e.g. 192.168.1.42). Required when your browser is NOT on the same device as Homebridge.

redirectUri.title: OAuth Redirect URI (optional override)
redirectUri.description: Leave empty — auto-built from hostIp. Only set manually if you use a reverse proxy.

notifyWebhookUrl.title: Re-auth Notification Webhook URL (optional)
notifyWebhookUrl.description: POST webhook called 7 days before token expiry (ntfy.sh, Pushover, n8n, Home Assistant, ...)

layout.title: Smartcar Credentials
layout.description: Create a free application at dashboard.smartcar.com to get these values.

layout.title: Network
layout.description: Set hostIp to the IP of your Raspberry Pi so the auth URL in the log is correct and the OAuth callback works from your browser.
